error_preview_file_deleted_desc: File has been deleted by the owner.
error_preview_invalid_token_desc: Invalid token or task does not exist.
error_preview_access_denied_desc: You are not allowed to view task.
error_preview_public_form_unavailable_de: The document may not be published yet or has been removed by the owner.
error_preview_share_invalid_code_desc: You are not allowed to view task.
error_preview_share_task_not_found_desc: Invalid token or task does not exist.
error_pdf_task_login_desc: The document was completed with signatures from all parties. Please log in to download the file.
error_pdf_task_access_desc: You are not included in this signing task. Switch account to log in the service.
error_pdf_task_link_invalid_desc: The signing request has been retrieved by the sender.
error_pdf_task_invalid_contact_desc:
We are not able to reach your email nor phone number at the moment.
If you see this message, please contact us immediately.
error_pdf_task_email_bounced_desc: We are not able to reach your email at the moment. If you see this message, please contact us immediately.
error_pdf_task_duplicate_working_state_d: Please close all DottedSign web pages and try again.
error_pdf_task_been_forwarded_desc: Since the sender has removed you from the signing process, you can no longer sign the document.
error_pdf_task_been_declined_desc: Since you has declined to sign, you can no longer sign the document.
error_code_expired_desc: The link has timed out, please contact the sender to resend the link.
error_task_expired_desc: The task has timed out, please contact the sender to resend the task.
error_file_not_ready_desc: Please wait a while since the file is still under process.
error_need_ca: Please verify your certificate authority first.
error_auth_error_need_confirm_desc: Please confirm your verification email or <u id='resendReq'>resend the request</u>.
error_auth_error_resend_done_desc: Mail send. Please follow the instructions in mail and try again.
task_sign_succ_desc: A completed signed document will be sent to your email once all parties finish signing.back Home
task_check_succ_desc: Fields checking completed. The signing process is continued.
task_modify_succ_desc: The task is review. Please wait until the review is complete, then proceed with confirmation or identity verification.
task_guest_sign_succ_desc: A completed signed document will be sent to your email once all parties finish signing. Please <u id='getSignUp'>Sign up</u> first to enjoy JackRabbit!
task_public_form_sign_succ_desc: Your signed document has been sent.
error_token_invalid_desc: The link is invalid, please contact the admin.
error_already_accepted_desc: You are already in the group.back to login
error_over_group_limit_desc: Group members count over group limit.
error_sign_panel_common_desc: Please check if you had opened more than 2 devices for autographing, and try again later.
error_sign_panel_mobile_desc: Please use a mobile device to complete it.
download_app_desc: Import documents, add signatures, text, and dates to documents. Request for signatures and manage signing tasks online.
